data.title: Main Bitcoin Critic Peter Schiff Gives Epic Response to Tom Lee and Michael Saylor
data.description:
New viral anti-crypto post by Peter Schiff proves he is not fan of Tom Lee and Michael Saylor, nor of the "friendship" between Bitcoin and Ethereum
source: https://u.today/main-bitcoin-critic-peter-schiff-gives-epic-response-to-tom-lee-and-michael-saylor

data.title: JPMorgan Economist Predicts Federal Reserve Rate Cut
data.description: According to BlockBeats, JPMorgan's Michael Feroli anticipates that the Federal Reserve will reduce interest rates by 25 basis points to a range of 4.0% to 4.25% next week. He expects two or three dissenters to advocate for further rate cuts, while no members are likely to support maintaining the current rates. The dot plot is expected to indicate additional rate cuts beyond 2025.

data.title: Tether to launch USAT, a US-based stablecoin
data.description: Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino said the company is launching a U.S.-based stablecoin called USAT.

data.title: Deputy Director of Beijing Municipal Bureau of Economics and Information Technology: The city's cumulative computing power exceeds 33,000P, relying on blockchain applications to support the construction of computing power infrastructure
data.description: The Beijing Municipal People's Government Information Office held a press conference on "Several Measures for Beijing to Establish a Mechanism for Growth in Future Industrial Investment and Promote Future Industrial Development." Gu Jinxu, member of the Party Leadership Group and Deputy Director of the Beijing Municipal Bureau of Economy and Information Technology, explained that the city's cumulative computing power exceeds 33,000 petabytes, with computing infrastructure being built on the back of blockchain applications. Incentive policies have been issued to support the first registration, transaction, entry into a database, and public access of data elements. Trading of artificial intelligence datasets at the Beijing Data Exchange has become the largest business segment on the exchange. The Beijing Artificial Intelligence Data Training Base has enhanced its data application development capabilities and upgraded its Data Sandbox to version 3.0, establishing an integrated "data-computing-modeling-application" service capability. (Zhitong Finance)

data.title: Solana's Drift Partners with Forward Industries for DeFi Innovations
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Solana ecosystem DeFi protocol Drift has announced its support for Multicoin's $1.65 billion PIPE financing initiative, Forward Industries. Drift co-founder @cindyleowtt shared this update on the X platform, highlighting the collaboration.

Drift will work closely with Forward Industries to explore and implement new use cases within the decentralized finance sector. This partnership aims to enhance the capabilities and applications of DeFi, leveraging the strengths of both entities.

data.title: U.S. Government Shutdown Risk Reaches 54% Amid Political Tensions
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from prediction market Kalshi indicates a 54% probability of a U.S. government shutdown this year, marking the highest level in months.

Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer warned on Thursday that Democrats are prepared to let government funding lapse if Republicans refuse to include essential healthcare provisions in any agreement.

data.title: South African fast food chain Wimpy now accepts Bitcoin Lightning Network payments in 450 stores
data.description: The Bitcoin Historian reports that South African fast food chain WIMPY now supports Bitcoin Lightning Network payments in 450 of its stores.

data.title: Tether Coming to America: Reveals 'US-Regulated' USAT Stablecoin, With Its Own CEO
data.description:
Tether's USAT will be helmed by Bo Hines, former director of the White House’s crypto working group, from Charlotte, North Carolina.
source: https://decrypt.co/339296/tether-coming-america-us-regulated-usat-stablecoin-own-ceo

data.title: UMA briefly fell by more than 10% and then rebounded to 1.36 USDT
data.description: OKX market data shows that UMA briefly fell below 1.3 USDT, a drop of 10%, before recovering slightly to 1.36 USDT. Previously, Polymarket announced that it would switch its oracle partner from UMA to Chainlink.

data.title: Bitcoin mining company IREN co-founder sells $66 million in shares as stock price hits new high
data.description: The Roberts brothers, co-founders and co-CEOs of Bitcoin mining company IREN, each sold one million shares, cashing out a combined $66 million, as the company's stock price surpassed $33, hitting a new high. After the reductions, they each still hold approximately 13.99 million shares, representing approximately 6% of IREN's outstanding shares. This is their second major share reduction in the past two years, following their previous sale of one million shares each in December 2023, when the stock price was around $5. (TheMinerMag)

data.title: Bo Hines named CEO of Tether’s new US arm as company unveils USAT stablecoin
data.description:
Bo Hines, who led t White House Crypto Council under President Donald Trump, has been named as CEO of Tether's newly created U. S. unit.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/370472/bo-hines-named-ceo-of-tethers-new-us-arm-as-company-unveils-usat-stablecoin?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences Significant Liquidations
data.description:
According to TechFlow, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market witnessed liquidations totaling $287 million over the past 24 hours. Long positions accounted for $70.31 million, while short positions saw liquidations amounting to $217 million.

Bitcoin experienced liquidations worth $68.58 million, and Ethereum saw $65.30 million in liquidations. In total, 107,083 traders faced liquidations during this period. The largest single liquidation occurred on a centralized exchange's BTCUSDT trading pair, valued at $3.11 million.

data.title: U.S. Department of Justice Seeks Forfeiture of Funds from Iranian Citizen
data.description: According to PANews, the U.S. Department of Justice has initiated a civil forfeiture lawsuit to recover $584,741 in USDT from an Iranian citizen. The individual, Mohammad Abedini, is identified as the founder of Iran's SDRA company, which reportedly provides technical support for the Iranian military drone 'Shahed.' The funds are allegedly held in a non-custodial cryptocurrency wallet, though authorities have not disclosed further details.

data.title: Corporate Crypto Adoption Heats Up as New Players Step In
data.description:
As institutional investors and corporations increasingly add digital assets to their balance sheets, Bitcoin and Ethereum are being recognized not just as speculative plays but as strategic long-term
source: http://www.yolowire.com/latestarticles/21339/corporate-crypto-adoption-heats-up-as-new-players-step-in

data.title: DOJ Seeks to Seize $500K in USDT from Iran Drone Supplier’s Private Wallet
data.description:
Mohammad Abedini ran a company that supplied navigation technology used in Iranian Shahed drones, deployed in conflicts worldwide.
source: https://decrypt.co/339288/doj-seeks-to-seize-500k-in-usdt-from-iran-drone-suppliers-private-wallet

data.title: SOL treasury company Forward Industries has purchased 4 million SOLs and has $800 million in funds available to buy SOLs.
data.description: According to Emmett Gallic, Forward Industries, the SOL treasury, has purchased 4 million SOL tokens, valued at approximately $800 million. Two million of these tokens are held in custody at Galaxy Digital, and 1.75 million are held at Coinbase Prime Custody. According to previous announcements, Forward Industries still has $800 million in funds available for SOL purchases.

data.title: Sui Ecosystem Momentum Protocol's cumulative transaction volume exceeds US$11 billion
data.description: Data shows that Sui's native ve(3,3) DEX protocol Momentum has exceeded US$11 billion in cumulative trading volume.

data.title: Expert Crypto Trader Says Dogecoin Price Looks ‘Very Good’, Here’s Why
data.description:
An expert crypto trader shares a strong view on Dogecoin and the broader market, saying conditions look very favorable right now. In their view, momentum is building for the Dogecoin price, and this is not a trend that traders should ignore. The trader warns that the current chart is one “you don’t want to fade. ” Dogecoin ETF Launch In The U
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin/dogecoin-price-looks-very-good/

data.title: Polymarket Integrates Chainlink Oracles for Price Prediction Market Settlements
data.description: Polymarket, an on-chain prediction market platform, announced the integration of Chainlink's oracle infrastructure to provide verifiable data and automate market settlement processes. Chainlink founder Sergey Nazarov stated that when market outcomes are resolved through the oracle network's high-quality data and tamper-proof computations, prediction markets will evolve into "reliable, real-time signals the world can trust." (The Block)

data.title: The initial forecast for the US one-year inflation rate in September was 4.8%, compared with the expected 4.7%.
data.description: The preliminary reading for the University of Michigan Consumer Confidence Index for September was 55.4, compared to the expected reading of 58. The preliminary reading for the one-year inflation rate for September was 4.8%, compared to the expected reading of 4.7%. (Jinshi)
